reviews.comment:
Nos alojamos tres personas en este Hotel el 15/07/2018, las instalaciones son buenas aparentemente, pero cuando nos quisimos bañar no había agua caliente, sólo agua fría.  Nos comentaron que hace mucho  tiempo tienen problemas con la caldera. No nos hicieron ningún descuento, ni lo pedimos. No entiendo porque  ofrecen servicios que no tienen, ya que cobran mucho más que en los Hoteles de Córdoba. Por supuesto que pierden clientes porque no nos alojaremos más ahí.

(Translated by Google)
Three of us stayed at this hotel on July 15, 2018. The facilities seemed fine, but when we wanted to shower, there was no hot water, only cold. We were told they've had problems with the boiler for a long time. They didn't offer us any discount, nor did we ask for one. I don't understand why they advertise services they don't have, since they charge much more than hotels in Córdoba. Of course, they're losing customers because we won't be staying there again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcU56UlpBEAE
